productDisplayName: Indigo Nation Men Check Grey Ties
description: With an intricate checkered silver and grey design in alternating broad and narrow checks, this tie from indigo nation is a perfect match for a variety of dress shirts - from classic black to blues, browns and greys. Length: 153 cm Made of 100% handmade microfibre for durability and easy use Has broad silver and grey checks on the wider tongue and collar region, and smaller ones on the knot and narrow tongue region Two navy blue stripes below the knot One loop and brand badge on the inner of the broad tongue to hold the narrow tongue in place Tie care only dry clean
